option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Portfolio-Service (localhost:8082)
Kunde anzeigen (PMS-Daten + Balance): http://localhost:8082/api/portfolio/100001
Order ok: http://localhost:8082/api/portfolio/100001/check/10/100
Order zu teuer: http://localhost:8082/api/portfolio/100002/check/10/100
Kunde unbekannt: http://localhost:8082/api/portfolio/999999/check/1/1
Compliance-Service (localhost:8084)
Instrument ok: http://localhost:8084/api/compliance/instrument/DE0005140008
Instrument sanctioned: http://localhost:8084/api/compliance/instrument/US0000000001
Combined ok: http://localhost:8084/api/compliance/customer/100001/DE0005140008
Combined sanctioned: http://localhost:8084/api/compliance/customer/100001/US0000000001
